name: Gelatinous Cube
summary: Transparent ooze that fills 10x10 dungeon corridors. Engulfs and dissolves.

racial_traits.name: Engulf
racial_traits.summary: Move into target's square; Reflex DC 12 to avoid being engulfed (paralyzed + acid damage 1d6/round).

racial_traits.name: Transparent
racial_traits.summary: DC 15 Perception to notice; passive observers usually walk into one.

racial_traits.name: Ooze Traits
racial_traits.summary: Mind-affecting, sleep, paralysis immunity; no Int / no flanking; not subject to crits or precision damage.
